# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: Creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.

Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Three-tier application VPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Three-tier application internet gateway

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    DependsOn: Vpc
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc

  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Public subnet for three-tier application

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Private subnet for three-tier application

  RouteTablePublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Public route table for three-tier application

  RouteTablePrivate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: Private route table for three-tier application

  AssociateRouteTablePublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    DependsOn: Subnet1
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePublic
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1

  AssociateRouteTablePrivate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    DependsOn: Subnet2
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePrivate
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2

Outputs:
  Vpc:
    Description: VPC for the three-tier application
    Value: !Ref Vpc
  InternetGateway:
    Description: Internet gateway for the three-tier application
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
  Subnet1:
    Description: Public subnet for the three-tier application
    Value: !Ref Subnet1
  Subnet2:
    Description: Private subnet for the three-tier application
    Value: !Ref Subnet2
  RouteTablePublic:
    Description: Public route table for the three-tier application
    Value: !Ref RouteTablePublic
  RouteTablePrivate:
    Description: Private route table for the three-tier application
    Value: !Ref RouteTablePrivate
